problems.title: Student with Nested Laptop Class
problems.description: Create a `Student` class that owns a nested `Laptop` class. Inside main(), create a student object and print the student details followed by the laptop brand, CPU, and RAM. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Create a `Student` class that owns a nested `Laptop` class. Inside main(), create a student object and print the student details followed by the laptop brand, CPU, and RAM.

examples.input:
Use the sample setup:
s1 = Student('Navin', 2)
s2 = Student('Jenny', 3)
s1.show()
